name: Arcana Force I - The Magician
name_jp: アルカナフォース<ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ⅰ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ワン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＴＨＥ ＭＡＧＩＣＩＡＮ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ザ・マジシャン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
If this card is Summoned: Toss a coin.
● Heads: If a Spell Card is activated, this card's ATK becomes double its original ATK until the end of that turn.
● Tails: If a Spell Card is activated, your opponent gains 500 LP.
